name: Five-Spice Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each cake of tofu in half horizontally.
2. Combine the marinade ingredients in a pot wide enough to accept the four tofu pieces in a single layer.
3. Bring the marinade to a boil and add the tofu.
4. Simmer, uncovered, on very low heat for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and marinate for 3 hours, turning 2 or 3 times.
6. Keep refrigerated and wrapped for up to a week.
